headline: Treasuries and Other Government Bonds Will Keep Selling Off, BlackRock Says. These Risks Are Lurking.
summary: Bond investors shouldn’t be surprised by steeper losses because of inflation driven by higher prices for oil, AI chips, and military spending.

headline: BlackRock launches new ethereum ETF packed with staking rewards
summary: BlackRock Head of Digital Assets Robbie Mitchnick joins Julie Hyman to discuss the company's launch of its new ethereum fund — the iShares Staked Ethereum Trust ETF (ETHB) — that lets investors track the cryptocurrency (ETH-USD) and earn staking rewards at the same time.

headline: Clean Energy Regains Its Swagger as Hedge Against Wartime Oil Crisis
summary: The iShares Global Clean Energy ETF jumped more than 5% last week, exceeding the oil-and-gas-focused Vanguard Energy ETF’s 1.3% gain.

headline: UniCredit to strengthen stake in Commerzbank to 30% laying groundwork for potential takeover
summary: UniCredit launched a voluntary takeover offer for Commerzbank on Monday, drawing opposition from Commerzbank and the German government.
